dependencies: Dependence on tractor and trailer manufacturers for equipment supply
Reliance on diesel fuel availability and pricing
Dependence on third-party transportation providers to supplement capacity
Reliance on third-party service providers for operational and technical services including cloud computing and data storage
risks: Shortages of raw materials (rubber, steel) required for production of critical operating equipment
Tractor and trailer manufacturers experiencing shortages of component parts and supplies leading to reduced production
Limited equipment availability and higher prices due to supply chain factors
Potential fuel shortages at certain service center locations
Disruptions in workforce, supply and availability of equipment, parts and services due to adverse economic conditions
Third-party service provider disruptions including data center failures, labor issues, or supply chain disruptions

regulatory_risks: DOT and various state and federal agency regulations on motor carrier operations, driver hours of service, safety and fitness of transportation equipment and drivers, transportation of hazardous materials
FMCSA rules on driver hours of service and electronic logging devices (ELDs)
Commercial Driver's License Drug and Alcohol Clearinghouse compliance requirements
Environmental laws and regulations on disposal, emission and discharge of hazardous materials, fuel storage tanks, transportation of certain materials, storm water discharge
EPA Clean Trucks Plan with stringent emission standards for nitrogen oxides and greenhouse gas emissions from heavy-duty engines

California Air Resources Board (CARB) standards to reduce nitrogen oxide emissions and Advanced Clean Trucks rule requiring manufacturers to only sell zero emission vehicles (ZEVs) in California beginning in 2036 model year
TSA and CBP cargo-security and transportation regulations
Potential new federal or state regulations on fuel-efficiency or engine emissions
Healthcare and mandated benefits-related coverage regulations
Data privacy and security laws including California Consumer Privacy Act and similar state-level laws
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) compliance for international operations
Potential changes in trade policies, tariffs, and trade agreements

sanction_risks: Exposure to restrictive trade policies and renegotiation of international trade agreements
Impact of tariffs imposed on goods imported into the United States and retaliatory tariffs by foreign governments
Potential trade wars reducing global economic activity
